How Spaced Repetition Works Here
When you mark a card ✅ Got It, its next review is scheduled further in the future (1 day → 3 days → 7 days → 14 days → 30 days). When you mark ❌ Review Again, it resets to 1 day. Cards due today appear in Due Today count and get prioritised in SRS Quiz. ⭐ Mastered = 5 correct reviews in a row with growing intervals.
✨ New Formula Card
Add multiple formulas — each its own row
💡 Plain text OK: A = πr². LaTeX also OK: A = \pi r^2. Both render beautifully.
📋 AI Card Importer
Generate prompt → ask any AI → paste output → done.
0 cards detected
Tell us what topic + how many cards → we'll generate the universal prompt that ANY AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok) understands. Paste into AI → copy AI's output → come back to tab 2.
💡 Next: Paste this into ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini / Grok → wait for response → copy entire response → switch to "Tab 2: Paste & Import".
Paste the AI's response below. Cards use === CARD === as separator. Multiple formulas per card supported — each new line under FORMULA: = separate row.
Preview — Review before creating:
✏️ Edit Formula Card

💡 Tip: In the print dialog, choose "Save as PDF" as destination to download a digital formula book.
